render_data.title: Train velocity through the tunnel
render_data.areaReadout: Tunnel length = area under v–t graph = ½(75+55)×25 = 1625 m

image_prompt: SVG: scatter graph Frequency / Hz (0-1800, ticks 200, minor 40) vs 1/Length / m⁻¹ (0-6, ticks 1, minor 0.2), five points (2.0,672),(2.5,840),(3.3,1120),(4.0,1344),(5.0,1680) with a straight best-fit line through the origin stopping at the last point (5.0,1680); gradient = speed of sound = 336 m/s.

render_data.title: Frequency vs 1/Length — plot the missing point
render_data.bestFit: Straight line of best fit through the origin
render_data.gradientReadout: gradient = Δf / Δ(1/L) = 1680 / 5.0 = 336 m s⁻¹ (speed of sound)
